title: poa nemoralis f. vulgaris
intro: Poa nemoralis f. vulgaris, also known as the Wood Meadow-grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Wood Meadow-grass include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve anxiety and stress, and even help in reducing fever. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and roots, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
